Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast

Class MergingStream

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.IdentListMerger
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.MergingStream
public final class MergingStream extends IdentListMerger
Merging streams that merge two other streams.

  • Constructor Details

  • Method Details

    • containsError

      public boolean containsError()
      Description copied from class: IdentListMerger
      Reports whether an error has been encountered while merging.

      An error is raised in one of the following cases:

      • An identifier is not typed.
      • Two identifiers, bearing the same name, have different types.

      Specified by:
      containsError in class IdentListMerger
      Returns:
      true if an error has been encountered while merging.

    • getName

      private final String getName(Identifier id)

    • getPotentialLength

      protected int getPotentialLength()
      Description copied from class: IdentListMerger
      Returns the maximal possible length of this stream, that is the size of the array to allocate to store the results of reading fully this stream.
      Specified by:
      getPotentialLength in class IdentListMerger
      Returns:
      the maximal possible length of this stream

    • getMaximalArray

      protected Identifier[] getMaximalArray()
      Description copied from class: IdentListMerger
      Returns the origin (an array) of one of the longest substream of this stream.
      Specified by:
      getMaximalArray in class IdentListMerger

    • getNext

      protected Identifier getNext()
      Description copied from class: IdentListMerger
      Returns the next identifier (advance the stream by one).

      Returns null is this stream is exhausted.

      Specified by:
      getNext in class IdentListMerger
      Returns:
      the name of the next identifier or null
